name: Broccoli Raisin Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large head of broccoli, washed and trimmed (use only florets, no stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the broccoli florets, onions, raisins, pecans, and bacon.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the dressing ingredients: vinegar, mayonnaise, and sugar.
3. Pour the dressing over the broccoli mixture and gently toss to combine.
4. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
5. The next day, gently toss again before serving.
